meta.title: Consequence Based ICS Risk Management
meta.description: Dale talks with Andy Bochman about the Consequence-Driven, Cyber-Informed Engineering (CCE)and John Cusimano about CyberPHA's. This focus on the consequence side of the risk management is gaining attention. It's not a replacement for security controls that will reduce likelihood, but it may be more efficient risk reduction than some security controls and lowers the maximum impact of a successful attack.
